title: rhododendron maximum f. album
intro: Rhododendron maximum f. album, also known as the white rhododendron, is a subspecies of the Great Rhododendron (Rhododendron maximum) - a flowering shrub native to eastern North America. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron maximum f. album include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in salves and poultices for topical application.
